sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18985" key="badismati/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαδ-ισμᾰτίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n18985.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a good walker,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:392" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">392</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
